message:
perf: intern CapabilityId and ZoneId using Arc<str>

Replace String with Arc<str> for CapabilityId and ZoneId to reduce
allocation overhead when these identifiers are cloned (which is
frequent in capability lookups and zone routing). Arc provides
reference-counted sharing when the same ID appears multiple times.

- Change CapabilityId inner type from String to Arc<str>
- Change ZoneId inner type from String to Arc<str>
- Update From/TryFrom implementations for Arc conversion
- No public API changes; conversion happens transparently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
